name: Auxiliary validation rule for Device Administration & MDM #7
description: Verify configuration matches parameters for UTSCF-DAM-07 in Device Administration & MDM category.
security_objective: Protect Tizen OS devices against security vulnerabilities by enforcing proper auxiliary validation rule for device administration & mdm #7 settings.
business_justification: Fulfills regulatory requirements and mitigates risk vectors related to Tizen OS device operations.
